cases.prompt: Upgrade an existing editable .drawio architecture diagram by making a copy, using lower-saturation colors, giving every module up to three concrete internal mechanism lines, and retaining editable 3D styling. Explain how you would revise, validate, export, and visually review it.

Turn a generic system-architecture brief into an editable draw.io figure with restrained colors, shallow 3D modules, meaningful icons, internal mechanisms, directional connections, and publication-quality PNG/SVG exports. Explain tool use, validation, and visual QA.

Create a public draw.io architecture example while the requester has also provided a confidential reference diagram. The public example must be synthetic, editable, visually rich, validated, exported, and safe to publish.
